case_title: CAPITAL ONE BANK VS. ROBERTO FERREIRA et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-31-2007 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE DEC-15-2006 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT: 1-DEFAULT JUDGMENT (CCP 585) 2-ATTORNEY'S FEES & COSTS (CCP 1033) 3-COPIES IN LIEU OF ORIGINALS (EVID 1550) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK
DEFAULT JUDGMENT REJECTED, PLACED IN PICKUP BOX, AS TO DEFENDANT FERREIRA, ROBERTO

COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK AS TO DEFENDANT FERREIRA, ROBERTO DOES 1 THROUGH 15 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR DEC-15-2006 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-16-2006 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         NOV-30-2006

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FERREIRA, ROBERTO $1,862.53 PRINCIPAL, $265.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,127.53, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

AMENDED REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $265.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT FERREIRA, ROBERTO

REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $265.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT FERREIRA, ROBERTO

DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE DEBT COLLECTION AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 THROUGH 15 INCLUSIVE
